description: A Python-based 'order-processor' service at /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/order-processor/ hangs for 10 seconds during shutdown and buffers logs instead of streaming them in real-time. Fix both issues by modifying the docker-compose.yml or Dockerfile. The container must stop gracefully in under 3 seconds and logs must stream in real-time. Avoid modifying the legacy Python script; use infrastructure-level fixes.
